headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on A.O. Smith, Lowers Price Target to $65
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Tomohiko Sano   maintains A.O. Smith (NYSE:AOS) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $75 to $65.

raw.headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on A.O. Smith, Lowers Price Target to $65
raw.summary: JP Morgan  analyst Tomohiko Sano   maintains A.O. Smith (NYSE:AOS) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $75 to $65.

headline: A. O. Smith Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: A. O. Smith (NYSE:AOS) reported first-quarter 2026 sales of $946 million, down 2% year-over-year, as modest growth in North America was more than offset by continued weakness in China. Earnings per share were $0.85, an 11% decline that Chief Financial Officer Chuck Lauber attributed to lower volumes
